language.restart_hint: Language changes apply after restarting this window

config.brightness_warning: ⚠ Turing 3.5" displays can get hot at high brightness!
config.restart_as_admin: ❌ Restart as administrator or select another hardware monitoring method
config.author:
Author: {name}
akary汉化
config.fan_tooltip:
If 'None' is selected, the CPU fan was not auto-detected.
Manually select your CPU fan from the list.

Fans missing from the list? Install the lm-sensors package, run 'sudo sensors-detect', then reboot.

weather.api_description:
To display a weather forecast on compatible themes, you need an OpenWeatherMap 'One Call API 3.0' key.
You receive 1,000 free API calls per day. This program stays below that threshold (about 300 calls/day).
weather.subscribe_link: Click here to subscribe to OpenWeatherMap One Call API 3.0.
weather.coordinate_help: You can use an online service to find your latitude and longitude, for example latlong.net (click here)
weather.location_search_help:
Enter a location to automatically retrieve coordinates (latitude/longitude).
For example: 'Berlin', 'London, GB', or 'London, Quebec'.
Set a valid API key and choose an API language first.
weather.error_empty_api_city: API key and city name cannot be empty.
weather.select_city_hint: Select your city from the list, then apply 'Fill in latitude/longitude'.
weather.no_city_selected: No city is selected or the search returned no results.

theme_editor.coordinate_hint: Click or draw a zone to show coordinates
theme_editor.reload_hint: This preview reloads when the theme file is updated
theme_editor.point: X={x:.0f}, Y={y:.0f} (click and drag to draw a zone)

error.import_help:
Please follow the start guide to install required packages: https://github.com/mathoudebine/turing-smart-screen-python/wiki/System-monitor-:-how-to-start
Or see the troubleshooting page: https://github.com/mathoudebine/turing-smart-screen-python/wiki/Troubleshooting#all-os-tkinter-dependency-not-installed
error.tkinter_help: Please install Tkinter using the project's troubleshooting instructions: https://github.com/mathoudebine/turing-smart-screen-python/wiki/Troubleshooting#all-os-tkinter-dependency-not-installed
error.cjk_font_missing: No compatible Simplified Chinese font was found. Install Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, or another supported CJK font, then restart the application.
